blocked_reason: dependency gate: dependency TASK-135 is blocked; dependency TASK-136 is blocked
description: Wire the ao-oai-runner binary into the AO agent orchestration pipeline. Changes: 1) crates/protocol/src/model_routing.rs - change tool_for_model_id() to return oai-runner for minimax/glm models instead of opencode, add oai-runner to tool_supports_repository_writes(). 2) crates/orchestrator-core/src/runtime_contract.rs - add oai-runner to cli_capabilities_for_tool() and build_cli_launch_contract() with args: run -m MODEL --format json PROMPT. 3) crates/llm-cli-wrapper/src/cli/types.rs - add OaiRunner variant to CliType enum. 4) crates/llm-cli-wrapper/src/cli/registry.rs - add OaiRunner to discovery and factory. 5) crates/llm-cli-wrapper/src/cli/launch.rs - add format flag enforcement for ao-oai-runner. 6) crates/agent-runner/src/runner/process_builder.rs - add oai-runner to AI CLI tool check.
title: Integrate oai-runner into AO routing and runtime contract
